# Daily Report — 2026-06-30

## Task Completed
Added `list_change_conflicts` tool targeting the `change_conflict` table in ServiceNow.
The tool lists scheduling and CI overlap conflicts detected for change requests.

Key features:
- Optional `change_id` filter: accepts CHG number (e.g. CHG0012345) or 32-char sys_id; auto-resolved via `_resolve_change_request_sys_id`
- Optional `type` filter (e.g. `ci_conflict`, `schedule_conflict`)
- Optional `state` filter (e.g. `unresolved`, `accepted`)
- Full pagination with `has_more` / `next_offset`
- `_format_change_conflict` helper normalises all reference fields (change_request, conflict_ci, conflict_change, blackout_window) from dict display values to plain strings
- Registered in `change_coordinator` and `full` packages

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1934
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes (25 new tests in test_list_change_conflicts.py)

## Security
Pre-existing environment-level vulnerabilities in setuptools, urllib3, wheel — unrelated to project code. No new vulnerabilities introduced.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/change_tools.py` — added `ListChangeConflictsParams`, `_format_change_conflict`, `list_change_conflicts`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — import and tool name registration
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — import and full tool descriptor registration
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added to `change_coordinator` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_list_change_conflicts.py` — 25 new tests

## Next Up
